subject: Re:
body:

From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>

Good morning,
I am not sure what I am to do at this point.  I am out of pills tomorrow, am 
I to contact Dr. Victor to stay on them or am I to go off of them?  I wasn't 
sure and knew you'd know best.

GM said I look like a walking dead person but Sarah says I look good.  UGH!

Glad you are back!  I still have a gift for you.

Catherine
